animals.name: Deshi Shahi Cow
animals.description: This healthy and strong local Deshi Shahi cow has been raised entirely on natural feed with no diseases. It has shiny skin, excellent meat quality, and is ideal for Qurbani. Calm temperament makes it safe and suitable for family sacrifice. Famous Bogura region Deshi breed, highly adaptable to local climate and well-fattened for Eid.

animals.name: Red Chittagong Cow
animals.description: Pure Red Chittagong bull with powerful body structure and superior meat quality. Its distinctive red color and strong build make it one of the most demanded breeds for Qurbani in Bangladesh. Well-trained, healthy, and perfect for family sacrifice with excellent taste and texture.

animals.name: Sahiwal Cow
animals.description: High quality Sahiwal cow with calm temperament and excellent dairy traits. Well-balanced meat and fat ratio makes it suitable for both Qurbani and milk production. Fully adapted to Rajshahi weather, healthy, strong and completely ready for Eid sacrifice.

animals.name: Black Bengal Goat
animals.description: Pure Black Bengal goat famous for its delicious and tender meat. Highly demanded during Eid ul Adha across Bangladesh. Compact body with dense meat quality. Raised on natural feed, healthy and energetic - perfect choice for Qurbani.

animals.name: Jamunapari Goat
animals.description: Large sized Jamunapari goat with impressive long ears and strong body structure. Attractive appearance and higher meat yield make it a premium choice for Qurbani. Health checked and well fed in Dhaka region.

animals.name: Beetal Goat
animals.description: Strong and muscular Beetal breed goat with good body weight and superior meat quality. Well-known for fast growth and excellent carcass quality. Perfect for Eid sacrifice with high meat proportion.

animals.name: Deshi Khasi
animals.description: Well-fattened Deshi Khasi (castrated male goat) ideal for Qurbani and special occasions. Excellent meat quality with tender texture. Raised in Bogura with natural feeds for best taste and health.

animals.name: Large Khasi
animals.description: Heavy and healthy large Deshi Khasi with superior meat quality and high body weight. Perfect for family Qurbani. Well cared for and properly fattened in Mymensingh region.

animals.name: Dumba Sheep
animals.description: Healthy Dumba sheep with prominent fat tail, highly valued for its unique meat flavor and Qurbani. The fat tail stores energy and enhances taste. Excellent choice for Eid sacrifice from Sirajganj.

animals.name: Deshi Camel
animals.description: Strong and healthy local Deshi camel suitable for transport as well as special Qurbani occasions. Robust build with excellent stamina. Well maintained and fully healthy for big Eid sacrifices.

animals.name: Premium Camel
animals.description: Premium quality Deshi camel with outstanding stamina and high body weight. Perfect for grand Qurbani events. Well-built, healthy and impressive appearance.

animals.name: Holstein Friesian Cow
animals.description: High milk yielding Holstein Friesian cow with large body frame. Excellent for dairy farming and also suitable for Qurbani. Healthy, strong and well cared for in Jessore region.

animals.name: Sindhi Cow
animals.description: Pure Sindhi breed cow known for excellent heat tolerance and good milk production. Strong body with superior meat quality suitable for Qurbani. Well adapted and healthy.

animals.name: Premium Khasi
animals.description: Very well-fattened premium Deshi Khasi with high body weight and superior meat quality. One of the best choices for Qurbani. Properly cared for and ready for Eid.
